name: Drunken Crab Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Flake crab meat, making sure to remove any cartilage.
2. Set the flaked crab meat aside.
3. Melt 1/4 cup butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
4. Stir in the flaked crab meat, cream, and whiskey into the saucepan.
5. Heat until the mixture is warmed throughout but do not boil.
6. Add milk and season with salt and white pepper to taste.
7. Cook until very hot but again, do not boil.
8. Serve immediately in a tureen or individual bowls.
9. Garnish with finely chopped parsley before serving.
